Article Title: Ex-CEA Ashok Lahiri to be Niti Aayog vice chairman; IISER’s Gobardhan Das a member
Article Text:
Appointments seen as part of long-awaited Niti revamp



NEW DELHI: Former chief economic adviser Ashok Lahiri is set to be named the new vice-chairman of Niti Aayog , replacing Suman Bery. Gobardhan Das, the director of the Indian Institute of Science Education and Research, Bhopal, is to be nominated as a member of the govt’s premier think tank.Lahiri is currently a BJP MLA from Balurghat, but is not contesting the 2026 assembly polls. Das, a former JNU professor, had contested from Purbasthali Uttar constituency in the 2021 state polls as a BJP candidate. The two appointments come amid polls in West Bengal with the second round of voting on Wednesday and will be seen as an overture to the electorate.Significantly, Das is a Dalit and had allegedly faced attacks from TMC cadres in the violence that followed the 2021 elections in Bengal.The appointments are seen as part of a long-awaited overhaul of Niti Aayog, where Bery, a surprise pick, has been at the helm for four years. On several occasions, the Modi administration was seen to have bypassed Bery and dealt directly with the members or the CEO.Lahiri will bring his training as an economist and a policymaker to Niti Aayog, which has a part-time CEO after BVR Subrahmanyam’s exit last month. Lahiri is a career economist who taught at Delhi School of Economics and worked at the World Bank and IMF before returning to the finance ministry in the late 1990s. He then went on to head the National Institute of Public Finance and Policy and was the chief economic adviser and subsequently a member of the 15th Finance Commission. He is seen as among the pioneers in the filed psephologist and co-authored ‘India Decides’ that mapped elections from 1952 to 1989.
Article Summary: Former chief economic adviser Ashok Lahiri is set to be named the new vice- chairman of Niti Aayog. Gobardhan Das, the director of the Indian Institute of Science Education and Research, Bhopal, is to be nominated as a member of the govt’s premier think tank. The appointments come amid polls in West Bengal with the second round of voting on Wednesday.

Article Title: Smiles fade, but the heart remembers
Article Text: Thirukkural with the Times explores real-world lessons from the classic Tamil text ‘Thirukkural’. Written by Tamil poet and philosopher Thiruvalluvar, the Kural consists of 1,330 short couplets of seven words each. This text is divided into three books with teachings on virtue, wealth, and love and is considered one of the great works ever on ethics and morality. The Kural has influenced scholars and leaders across social, political, and philosophical spheres. Motivational speaker, author and diversity champion Bharathi Bhaskar explores the masterpiece. There are airports where journeys begin, and those where something within us quietly comes undone. That day, somewhere between departure gates, amid the hum of announcements, I met a friend , Param — Paramasivam. A man who could laugh at anything, dissolve solemnity with a joke. But that day, he sat still. The laughter had withdrawn from his face. Over an overpriced cup of coffee, his story emerged. He was travelling for a funeral, that of a childhood friend. “Heart attack?” I asked. “Maybe,” he said. “We don’t even know how he died. But we all knew he would, soon.” What followed was not a story of death, but of a long companionship. His friend had slipped into alcoholism. Param had tried everything — rehabilitation centres, jobs, repeated chances. Each attempt ended the same way. Each failure left Param a little closer to his friend. He had pleaded with the friend’s wife to not leave her husband. He had endured humiliation from his own family for supporting an alcohol addict. For years, he quietly paid bills. “This must be a relief,” I said, almost reflexively. Param looked at me, his voice steady but wounded. “I only wish I had done more. I wish I had stayed in the same city. I wish I had somehow brought him back. I am guilty. He was my friend.” In that moment, the words of Valluvar rose, not as poetry remembered, but as truth revealed: Mugamnaga Natpadhu Natpadru: Nenjaththu Agamnaga Natpadhu Natpu The love that rests only in the smile of the face is no friendship at all; that which dwells in the quiet smile of the heart — that alone is friendship. I was reminded of Khalil Gibran, who wrote, “When you part from your friend, grieve not, for what you love most in him, may be clearer in his absence” . Yet grief lingers, because love does not dissolve with absence. In the Mahabharata, there is a moment of grace. Karna, in playful ease, pulls the pearl strings at Bhanumathi’s waist. The pearls scatter. Duryodhana enters. He does not question. He simply asks, “Shall I gather the pearls, or string them back?” Science, too, bows to such truths. In his famous book Phantoms in the Brain , Dr V S Ramachandran writes of a patient who had forgotten how to smile; the trauma had damaged the neural pathway. The patient could obey every instruction but could not smile when asked. And yet, one day, when a childhood friend visited him, he smiled. Because there exists another pathway — the one that awakens not by command, but by memory. The face had forgotten. The heart had not. As our flights were announced, Param and I walked in silence. Friendship is not always joy. Sometimes, it is endurance. Sometimes, helplessness. Sometimes, a quiet, unrelenting guilt that asks for nothing, yet gives in abundance. When did your friend enter your life? So gently that you cannot trace the beginning. They arrive without announcement yet rearrange the inner landscape of your being. And when memory falters, somewhere, in the unseen chambers of the heart, a presence remains. And in that silent, unforgotten space, before thought can intervene, the heart remembers. And it smiles.
Article Summary: Bharathi Bhaskar explores real-world lessons from the classic Tamil text ‘Thirukkural’ Written by Tamil poet and philosopher Thiruvalluvar, the Kural consists of 1,330 short couplets of seven words each. This text is divided into three books with teachings on virtue, wealth, and love.

Article Title: Develop space toilet, world needs it: Indian astronaut Prashant Nair asks desi startups
Article Text:
.

Watch Group Captain Shubhanshu Shukla Gets Ashoka Chakra; 70 Gallantry Awards Announced Group Captain Shubhanshu Shukla Gets Ashoka Chakra; 70 Gallantry Awards Announced

Astronaut-designate Group Captain Prashant Nair , who is being trained for the Gaganyaan mission along with Grp Capt Shubhanshu Shukla, has requested Indian startups “to make space toilet” as the world needs more research on that front.Speaking at the DefSpace symposium here on Friday, Nair, nicknamed ‘Papa’, said, “Russia is the only country in the world that has an effective space toilet in place. Even Americans had to depend on Russian technology on the International Space Station.” For years, the US segment of the ISS relied on Russian-designed and built toilet systems. Noticeably, Nasa’s Artemis II manned mission to Moon, Orion spacecraft’s universal waste management system (toilet) malfunctioned shortly after the launch this month.On having any feeling of anxiety as Gaganyaan is India’s first manned mission to space, Group Captain Nair, an experienced IAF pilot-turned-astronaut, said, “I love danger. When I flew Sukhois, I used to fly at max height and think 'can I fly even higher'. Now, I am getting an opportunity to be part of Gaganyaan and go to space. I want to feel eternal peace in space. We are star material and we will be part of it one day. So, why fear?”Speaking to TOI on the sidelines of the event, Group Captain Nair said, “The first manned mission with a humanoid (Vyommitra) is expected this year itself.Our manned mission is expected by 2026-end or in 2027.”When asked about any special training to avoid collision with space debris, he said, “It will certainly be part of the mission. Currently, we have not got the details in Isro . Earlier for the Axiom mission preparation, Shux (Group Captain Shubhanshu Shukla) and I were trained by Nasa how to manoeuvre the spaceship away from space debris.” “Shux shared his interesting experience on the ISS mission with us,” Nair told TOI.At the symposium, Group Captain Shukla said, “Earlier, the world was not taking us seriously. But when we launched three Chandrayaan missions and landed on the south pole side of the Moon, the world started taking us seriously. Now, the surprise element is gone. Countries want to join our Gaganyaan programme. Being a manned mission, world expectations have also increased from Gaganyaan, so is our responsibilities. So, lots of things have to be done as this is India’s first mission.”Shukla said, “Isro has developed a lot of key technologies indigenously for the mission and we have full trust on our scientists for this mission”.
Article Summary: Astronaut-designate Group Captain Prashant Nair is being trained for the Gaganyaan mission along with Grp Capt Shubhanshu Shukla. Nair, nicknamed ‘Papa’, said, “Russia is the only country in the world that has an effective space toilet’

Article Title: Men dominate the 21K in the 30–39 age category with discipline and relentless consistency
Article Text: In the 21K race, the 30–39 age category stood out for its control, structure, and consistency. This is the distance where endurance meets strategy - and this group executed it with precision.Abdul Mashood set the tone with a run that was composed and measured, maintaining a steady rhythm from start to finish.Close behind, Pradeep Kumar Pal brought in a journey that reflects how strong runners are built over time. What began as casual runs with friends gradually evolved into a disciplined pursuit as his performance improved. Over time, he went on to compete at the Delhi state level, steadily building his presence in the running circuit. His approach today is rooted in training, discipline, and consistent effort - a process that shows in the way he holds pace across a demanding distance like the 21K.Rohit Kumar added further strength to the category with a steady and composed run, reinforcing the depth and competitiveness of the field.What made this category stand out was not just performance - but how it was delivered.Calm. Structured. Sustained.These are runners who understand that a 21K is not won in the first few kilometres - it’s managed across all of them.Because in the 30–39 age category, the 21K isn’t just about speed - it’s about staying consistent when it matters the most.
Article Summary: In the 30–39 age category, the 21K isn’t just about speed. It’s about staying consistent when it matters the most. These are runners who understand that a 21K is not won in the first few kilometres.

Article Title: Women shine in the 21K in the 30–39 age category with balance and consistency
Article Text: In the 21K race, the 30–39 age category distinguished itself through balance and control. A distance that tests both endurance and discipline, it requires runners to manage pace and sustain effort - and this group delivered with remarkable consistency.Frida Parnas and Sonali Gupta delivered composed and consistent runs, maintaining their rhythm with focus and clarity throughout the course. Their performances were not defined by sudden bursts, but by steady control from start to finish.Further adding depth to the category, Sonali Gupta and G S Divya reflected journeys shaped by consistency and adaptability.Since 2022, Sonali has steadily built her running routine, gradually increasing her distance. A key milestone came on 31st December 2025, when she completed a 15K+ run. Despite facing injuries, she continued to train - adapting her approach and learning how to sustain her runs. She has also completed her first half marathon at the Cognizant run, while maintaining a weekly routine of 35–40 kilometres.Meanwhile, G S Divya, a doctor by profession, began running regularly with her husband and had earlier been part of smaller marathons.Over time, running became an integral part of her routine - something that fits naturally into her life rather than standing apart from it. Her run reflects that mindset - measured, balanced, and grounded in consistency.What sets this category apart is not just performance, but how it is sustained across the distance. These runners understand that a 21K is not about pushing harder at every moment, but about holding a rhythm that lasts.Calm. Balanced. Controlled.They are not chasing extremes - they are building endurance in a way that is practical, sustainable, and aligned with their everyday lives.And that is what makes their performance powerful.Because in the 30–39 age category, the 21K isn’t just about endurance - it’s about staying consistent, even when the distance begins to test you.
Article Summary: Frida Parnas and Sonali Gupta delivered composed and consistent runs. Sonali has steadily built her running routine, gradually increasing her distance. G S Divya, a doctor by profession, began running regularly with her husband. Her run reflects that mindset - measured, balanced, and grounded in consistency.

Article Title: 'Virat Kohli isn't a natural six-hitter but ... ': Mohammad Kaif after RCB's win over GT
Article Text:
Mohammad Kaif and Virat Kohli (BCCI Photo)

Watch Bombay Sport Exchange: Munaf Patel on Gautam Gambhir, Virat vs Bumrah & Indian bowling. Bombay Sport Exchange: Munaf Patel on Gautam Gambhir, Virat vs Bumrah & Indian bowling.

Poll Who do you think is the best six-hitter in IPL history? Chris Gayle Rohit Sharma Virat Kohli Other

NEW DELHI: Former India international cricketer Mohammad Kaif heaped praise on Virat Kohli after the RCB star crossed 300 IPL sixes, highlighting how his growth as a T20 batter reflects adaptability rather than natural power-hitting.Taking to X (formerly Twitter), Kaif wrote, "Virat Kohli taking his IPL 6s tally to 303 is an incredible achievement. Imagine Gayle has 360 and Rohit 310. Kohli isn't a natural six-hitter but he worked on his game to meet the demand of the modern game. His greatness is his adaptability and showing courage to come out of his comfort zone."Kohli once again showed that evolution in action during RCB’s five-wicket win over Gujarat Titans, where he scored a fluent 81 while Devdutt Padikkal smashed 55.Their 115-run stand ensured a smooth chase of 206, completed in 18.5 overs.Kohli later credited his partner, saying, "This is the second time Dev (Devdutt Padikkal) has come and done this. You never see him slogging the ball yet he's playing so freely. His innings was the difference in the first half and then I was trying to stay in the game so he won't feel the pressure. Dev was going great guns and the idea was to keep the pressure on the bowlers.There was intent, clarity and feedback from the other and and we didn't have any doubts in the partnership and that's what worked for us. "He also underlined RCB’s batting strength: "We have a tremendous batting lineup. If you look at the talent on display, we have guys who can play good cricket shots, you have the power of Tim David and Shepherd and then you have the smarts of Krunal. So the message is simple - you see a ball to hit, go for it because you have the depth."Firstly, we were quite happy we were able to play five games here and the fans get to see the team again. Special place to play cricket and hopefully we'll be able to come back and play here again later in the season."Earlier, Sai Sudharsan’s composed century powered GT to 205/3, but a slowdown in the death overs kept the target within reach, allowing Kohli and Padikkal to take control and seal another convincing win for RCB.
Article Summary: Mohammad Kaif heaps praise on Virat Kohli after the RCB star crossed 300 IPL sixes. Kaif highlights how Kohli's growth as a T20 batter reflects adaptability rather than natural power-hitting. Kohli once again showed that evolution in action during RCB’s win over Gujarat Titans.

Article Title: Patrick Mahomes Injury Update: Patrick Mahomes' comeback remains uncertain ahead of the 2026 NFL Draft: when will he return?
Article Text:
(Image via: Getty)

When Will Patrick Mahomes Be Back? Chiefs Enter Draft With No Clear Answer



As the 2026 NFL Draft approaches, the Kansas City Chiefs are facing an offseason unlike any they’ve had in the Patrick Mahomes era. The million-dollar question or rather, the multi-year contract question, is the timeline for their franchise quarterback’s return.The Reality of the Injury Mahomes, who tore both his ACL and LCL in a devastating blow against the Chargers back on December 14, 2025, is now four months into a long, grueling recovery. Surgery in Dallas confirmed the severity of the damage, and since then, the team has been meticulously managing his rehab.The good news is that Mahomes was in attendance for the start of the Chiefs' voluntary offseason program this week. Head coach Andy Reid has been optimistic, noting that Mahomes is hitting his marks: he’s in meetings, doing weight training, and working closely with the training staff. But the team is being cagey for a reason.As Reid put it, they are going to "play it by ear" and be smart about the process. While Mahomes has publicly stated his goal is to be ready for Week 1 with no restrictions, he’s also wise enough to admit that he can't predict how his knee will react to the increased intensity of on-field work.This uncertainty has completely shifted the vibe of this year’s draft for Kansas City. Usually, the Chiefs are drafting to solidify a championship roster around a healthy MVP. This year, they are drafting with insurance in mind.The front office already made a major move in March by trading for Justin Fields from the New York Jets. By bringing in Fields, the Chiefs have secured a high-upside backup who can lead the offense if Mahomes isn't 100% by September. This move was huge because it takes the "panic" out of the draft. They no longer have to reach for a quarterback just to survive the first month of the season.Instead, the team can focus on drafting the best players available to bolster the protection around whoever is taking the snaps. Whether it's beefing up the offensive line to keep the pocket clean or grabbing another explosive playmaker to make life easier for the quarterback, the draft strategy has pivoted from "maintaining the dynasty" to "building a bridge."The bottom line is that while Mahomes is pushing to beat the odds and be back for the season opener, the organization is clearly preparing for a scenario where he might need a few extra weeks. For Chiefs fans, the goal for this draft is simple: build a team that can win even if the MVP isn't out there for the first kickoff.
Article Summary: Patrick Mahomes tore both his ACL and LCL in a devastating blow against the Chargers back on December 14, 2025. Mahomes has publicly stated his goal is to be ready for Week 1 with no restrictions, but he’s also wise enough to admit he can't predict how his knee will react to the increased intensity of on-field work.

Article Title: Wedding ring detail in Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini's alleged affair moment adds new twist amid outrage
Article Text:
Wedding ring detail in Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini's alleged affair moment adds new twist amid outrage.(Image via Getty Images)

Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini’s pictures spark chaos about his wedding ring as his wife stays silent



Is Mike Vrabel getting fired after Dianna Russini had to leave her job?



Mike Vrabel, the New England Patriots’ head coach, has landed himself in major trouble alongside his alleged affair partner Dianna Russini.Though the two initially denied having an affair, their pictures from 2020 sharing a kiss at a bar have sparked outrage.A few hours ago, as Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini’s pictures from the New York City bar in 2020 sparked chaos, it seems a tiny detail was missed which eagle eyed fans have uncovered.In the pictures, Mike Vrabel was spotted holding Dianna Russini with his left hand as he approached her for a kiss. The New England Patriots’ head coach’s wedding ring was fully visible as he held on to her and it has sparked outrage.A fan commented, “The detail in the picture is that he’s touching her with the same hand his wedding ring is on…”, while another fan wrote, “With the wedding ring on and everything. Vrabs needs to step down as HC. Coaches resign or get fired for much less.”A third fan posted, “This was literally the night after the WHO declared COVID a pandemic! They knew their time together would be limited after this night!!”Many fans have expressed how heartbroken they are for Mike Vrabel’s wife, Jennifer Vrabel, and Dianna Russini’s husband, Kevin Goldschmidt, even though both have tried to stay out of the spotlight and remain silent about the alleged affair drama.While Dianna Russini has deleted her account on X, Mike Vrabel has addressed the pictures from 2020 even though he did not directly speak about it,At a recent press conference, after Mike Vrabel expressed that he needs to step away from NFL Draft, he said, “My priorities are my family and this football and in that order…”The New England Patriots’ head coach added, “There's a balance there that I’m going to create. My family needs me this weekend and that’s where I’ll be."While there have been strong speculations of his employment ending soon with the New England Patriots, the team has stayed away from confirming anything for now.
Article Summary: Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini’s pictures spark chaos about his wedding ring as his wife stays silent. The New England Patriots’ head coach's wedding ring was fully visible as he held on to her and it has sparked outrage. The two initially denied having an affair.

Article Title: 'Cooper Connolly went to Australia for scans': PBKS give major update on all-rounder's availability ahead of DC clash
Article Text:
Punjab Kings' Cooper Connolly during the Indian Premier League (IPL) 2026 T20 cricket match between Punjab Kings and Lucknow Super Giants, in New Chandigarh, Punjab. (PTI )

Watch Venugopal Rao explains where Delhi Capitals lost the game while chasing a big total Venugopal Rao explains where Delhi Capitals lost the game while chasing a big total

Australian all-rounder Cooper Connolly will be available for Punjab Kings (PBKS) in their IPL 2026 match against Delhi Capitals on Saturday, with spin-bowling coach Sairaj Bahutule confirming the young all-rounder is fit and ready.The 22-year-old had briefly travelled back to Australia for scans on his back, while Cricket Australia monitored his bowling fitness."Yes, he's very much available. He just went there and has come back. He's ready and raring to go,” Bahutule said on the eve of PBKS’ match against DC.In his first IPL season, Connolly has played an important role in Punjab’s rise to the top of the table. He has scored 223 runs at a strike rate of 163.97, including innings of 72 not out and 87.However, the spin-bowling all-rounder is yet to bowl in the tournament.Punjab, last season’s runners-up, are currently at the top of the points table and have been one of the more consistent teams this season.Bahutule, however, said there is still work to do with the new ball."When it comes to bowling, the new-ball phase has been decent, but that’s an area we need to improve. The middle and death overs have been fabulous for us," he said.He also said the team has enough batting depth to handle difficult situations."Going forward, there will be situations where the batters might not get a start, but I think we are very well-equipped. There is depth in our batting,” he added.Delhi Capitals will have to play out of their skins to get their stuttering campaign back on track when they face high-flying Punjab Kings in Delhi on Saturday.It will be a daunting task for the struggling Delhi outfit -- smarting from a comprehensive 47-run defeat to Sunrisers Hyderabad -- to stand up to a Punjab side that has been firing on all cylinders this season.
Article Summary: Australian all-rounder Cooper Connolly will be available for Punjab Kings in their IPL 2026 match against Delhi Capitals. Spin-bowling coach Sairaj Bahutule confirms Connolly is fit and ready. Connolly has scored 223 runs at a strike rate of 163.97, including innings of 72 not out and 87.

Article Title: “Talent is useless”- Super-agent hands over Lamine Yamal tips to become GOAT of football like Cristiano Ronaldo and Lionel Messi
Article Text:
Lamine Yamal and Cristiano Ronaldo

Jorge Mendes outlines the path to football greatness

Super-agent Jorge Mendes has sent a clear message to young football stars. This includes the Barcelona talent Lamine Yamal, about what it takes to achieve long-term success. He believes that raw talent alone is not enough to reach the top level. Instead, discipline, lifestyle, and smart career decisions play a major role. Mendes pointed to Cristiano Ronaldo and Lionel Messi as the ultimate examples of how players should shape both their careers and personal lives.The Portuguese agent spoke after a recent injury concern around Lamine Yamal and used the moment to highlight the risks young players face. He stressed that early career choices can define whether a player becomes a global icon or fades away. Mendes insisted that the next generation must learn from the past. According to him, the path to greatness is already clear, but only a few are willing to follow it fully.Jorge Mendes explained (per A Bola ) that when he talks to young players, he often puts them in a situation where they must decide what kind of career they want. He tells them to think about whether they want to follow the professional and personal habits of Cristiano Ronaldo and Lionel Messi, or take a different path that may not lead to success.He made it clear that the biggest difference between legends and average players lies in what they do away from the pitch.He described Ronaldo as not only one of the greatest players ever but also a perfect example of discipline and professionalism in daily life. Mendes added that this is the kind of standard that should be shown to young footballers across the world. For him, success is built on consistency, sacrifice, and strong habits. This can be achieved over many years.The agent also highlighted the importance of choosing the right club environment. He said that joining a smaller team where a player gets regular game time can sometimes be better. As compared to signing for a big club and sitting on the bench. According to Mendes, many talented players fail not because they lack ability. However, because they do not get enough chances to play and develop.He also warned young stars to be careful with money and lifestyle choices. Mendes advised them to focus on stability. He stressed on supporting their families, and avoid risky business ventures early in their careers. He suggested that only players who have already reached the highest level, like Ronaldo, can afford to explore such opportunities without affecting their game.
Article Summary: Super-agent Jorge Mendes has sent a clear message to young football stars. He believes that raw talent alone is not enough to reach the top level. Instead, discipline, lifestyle, and smart career decisions play a major role. Mendes pointed to Cristiano Ronaldo and Lionel Messi as the ultimate examples of how players should shape their careers and personal lives.

Article Title: What is Danielle Rose Collins' net worth in 2026? Inside her career earnings, college rise, and fearless tennis comeback story
Article Text:
What is Danielle Rose Collins' net worth in 2026? Inside her career earnings, college rise, and fearless tennis comeback story (Image Via Getty Images)

Danielle Collins ' net worth and earnings

Danielle Collins' early life and college success built her base

Danielle Collins' professional career and major achievements



Recent updates about Danielle Collins and his playing style



Danielle Collins is known as one of the hardest-working and most fearless players on the WTA Tour. Her journey to the top has not been easy. She did not come through the usual fast track but instead built her career step by step, starting from college tennis and then proving herself on the biggest stages. What makes her story special is her strong mindset and never-give-up attitude.Danielle Collins’ net worth is estimated to be around $7 million as of 2025-2026 (According to Sportskeeda). Her primary source of income comes from her official WTA Tour prize winnings. Her total career prize earnings exceed $9 million, and that amount keeps increasing as she participates in additional competitions.She has worked with brands like New Balance and FP Movement. However, she does not earn as much from endorsements as other major tennis players do.Danielle Collins was born on December 13, 1993, in St. Petersburg, Florida. She grew up playing tennis and showed talent at a young age. She first joined the University of Florida but later moved to the University of Virginia.In Virginia, she made a big name for herself. She won the NCAA singles title twice, in 2014 and 2016. In 2016, she also won the Honda Sports Award, given to the best female college tennis player in the US.These wins helped her gain attention before turning professional.Collins started playing on the ITF circuit early and won multiple titles there. She officially turned professional in 2016. Her big breakthrough came in 2018 when she reached the semifinals of the Miami Open and defeated top players like Venus Williams.In 2021, she won her first WTA titles at Palermo and the second at the Silicon Valley Classic. These wins boosted her ranking and confidence. In 2022, she reached her first Grand Slam final at the Australian Open but lost to Ashleigh Barty. Still, she entered the top 10 for the first time, which was a major milestone.In recent seasons, Collins has continued to compete strongly on the tour. She is still dealing with health issues, including endometriosis, but has made strong comebacks each time.On court, she is known for her aggressive style. She plays with power, hits strong groundstrokes, and shows high energy in matches. Her fighting attitude makes her a tough opponent.She remains a respected player with fans appreciating both her skill and determination, but she is in the process of stepping back from full-time competition and is expected to retire in the near future
Article Summary: Danielle Collins' net worth is estimated to be around $7 million as of 2025-2026. Her primary source of income comes from her official WTA Tour prize winnings. Her total career prize earnings exceed $9 million, and that amount keeps increasing as she participates in additional competitions.

Article Title: Eddie Hearn leaks Anthony Joshua vs Tyson Fury fight date and venue as boxing icon returns back to ring after fatal crash
Article Text:
Anthony Joshua. Image via: Getty Images

Anthony Joshua vs Tyson Fury deal nears completion as talks progress

Watch Eddie Hearn: Joshua vs Fury "Done Within A Week" Eddie Hearn: Joshua vs Fury "Done Within A Week"

The long-awaited heavyweight clash between Anthony Joshua and Tyson Fury could finally become reality very soon. Reports suggest Joshua may sign his part of the agreement as early as next week. This comes after Fury ended his brief retirement and returned to the ring with a dominant win over Arslanbek Makhmudov at Wembley Stadium earlier this month. After the fight, Fury directly called out Joshua, raising excitement among boxing fans worldwide.Joshua, who was present at ringside during Fury’s comeback fight, chose not to enter the ring for a face-off. Despite that, negotiations have been ongoing behind the scenes. Saudi boxing figure Turki Alalshikh is playing a key role in finalizing the deal. Both camps are now reportedly close to reaching an agreement. If everything goes as planned, the fight could take place later this year, possibly in the United Kingdom.Promoter Eddie Hearn has indicated that discussions are moving in the right direction. He explained to Sportsman Boxing that Tyson Fury has already agreed to the deal, and now the focus is on getting Anthony Joshua to sign.According to him, several contract drafts have been exchanged between both sides, and the negotiations are now in the final stages. He made it clear that both camps are fully committed to making this fight happen and believes there is a strong possibility of an agreement being reached within days.Joshua has been in similar situations before. He previously signed a deal to fight Deontay Wilder, but that fight collapsed after Wilder lost to Joseph Parker. This has made experts like Carl Froch and David Haye cautious about Joshua taking any risky interim bouts before the Fury fight.Joshua last fought in December against Jake Paul in Miami, winning comfortably. However, shortly after that bout, he was involved in a tragic car accident in Nigeria. The crash resulted in the deaths of two close friends. Despite the emotional setback, Joshua has returned to training and is currently working in Valencia with the team of Oleksandr Usyk.The financial structure of the fight is also unique. Instead of negotiating percentage splits, Alalshikh is expected to offer both fighters fixed purses. Hearn also mentioned that the bout is likely to happen around November. While he personally believes it should take place in London, possibly at Wembley, he admitted that the final decision on the venue will be made by the organizers.
Article Summary: Anthony Joshua vs Tyson Fury deal nears completion as talks progress. Reports suggest Joshua may sign his part of the agreement as early as next week. Saudi boxing figure Turki Alalshikh is playing a key role in finalizing the deal. Both camps are now reportedly close to reaching an agreement.

You just can’t name your kid the same name as the guy you are having an affair with.”To make matters worse, just a couple of hours ago, Page Six published photos of Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini engaging in a kiss at a New York City bar in 2020.This has now raised concerns about Dianna Russini’s first born as many fans are urging her husband to get a DNA test done.However, both Dianna Russini and her husband, Kevin Goldschmidt, have stayed distant from all the rumors about their marriage going downhill as their oldest son gets dragged into the drama.Interestingly, as per Page Six, the outlet did ask for Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini’s comments before publishing their photos together from 2020.Just hours later, the New England Patriots’ head coach announced that he will be stepping away from the NFL Draft as he seeks counselling for all the things that have been happening in his life.The popular NFL insider and reporter, Dianna Russini, has stayed silent as their new pictures spark shockwaves across the league.

Article Title: Travis Kelce And Taylor Swift: “No wedding coming”: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding mystery deepens as a radio DJ’s blunt response leaves fans confused
Article Text:
Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding mystery deepens as a radio DJ’s blunt response leaves fans confused(Getty Images)

Greg James’ blunt remark adds fresh doubt as the secrecy around Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding continues



The talk around Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce 's wedding plans took a fresh turn on April 23, 2026. A casual TV moment quickly sparked new questions. This time, it was not a leak or insider report. It came from a radio host’s offhand reply that fans picked apart within minutes.For weeks, reports have pointed to a highly secretive setup. Now, that mystery only looks deeper. With no confirmed venue and tight control around details, even small comments carry weight. And this one has clearly landed.During an appearance on This Morning on April 23, Greg James responded to questions about the much-discussed wedding of Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce. Host Ben Shephard asked if he had received an invite after earlier chatter suggested he might be on the guest list.James did not confirm anything. Instead, he said, “Not yet. Or maybe never,” on the ITV show. And joked that if anything, he and Graham Norton would be attending together, playing along with the ongoing speculation. He kept the tone light. It quickly spread online like wildfire, with fans reading into the line.One fan wrote, “So he confirms there’s no wedding coming.” Another added, “Maybe he is not invited.” The reactions show how closely fans track updates around Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce.However, insider reports still suggest the wedding is very much on. A few days back, journalist Rob Shuter wrote in his “Naughty But Nice” newsletter, “There’s a date, but no venue,” citing a source close to the couple. Another insider added in the same report, “The truth is, no one knows exactly where it will be yet. Not even the guests.”That secrecy appears intentional. With Travis Kelce, the Kansas City Chiefs star, and Swift drawing global attention, any confirmed location could attract crowds and leaks. Sources said the couple want full control and privacy until the final moment.Still, James’ comment adds a twist. It does not confirm anything. But it fuels the uncertainty. If even rumored guests remain unsure, it only strengthens the mystery.As of now, only one fact stands out: Swift and Kelce are engaged. Everything else remains tightly guarded. And until the couple speaks, even a simple remark can keep the speculation alive.
Article Summary: Greg James’ blunt remark adds fresh doubt as the secrecy around Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding continues. With no confirmed venue and tight control around details, even small comments carry weight. insider reports still suggest the wedding is very much on.

Article Title: NFL Trade Rumor: Dallas Cowboys linked to risky move for $14M New York Giants star after back to back disappointing seasons
Article Text:
Dallas Cowboys linked to risky move for $14M New York Giants star after back to back disappointing seasons.(Image via X)

Dallas Cowboys linked to the New York Giants’ star player, Kavyon Thibodeaux, after a poor run



The Dallas Cowboys have had a pretty poor run on the field in the last two seasons with just 7 wins and 10 losses both in 2024 and 2025.With the Dallas Cowboys’ last playoff win being in January 2023, it seems the team is focused on bouncing back on the field in the new season.A few hours ago, Bleacher Report’s Alex Kay predicted that there is a chance that the Dallas Cowboys could make a move for the New York Giants’ star player, Kavyon Thibodeaux.Bleacher Report’s Alex Kay wrote in a recent report, “Dallas has several draft picks in this range it could use to make a run at Thibodeaux, including Nos. 92 and 112 overall.”Bleacher Report’s Alex Kay added, “While his recent efforts don't quite warrant that sort of capital, Thibodeaux is still only 25 years old and has shown he can be a double-digit sack contributor when healthy and motivated.”Bleacher Report’s Alex Kay continued, “Trading for Thibodeaux is the type of gamble the Cowboys must make if they are going to make significant defensive strides in 2026 following last year's abysmal showing.”However, the Dallas Cowboys have not confirmed any trade talks concerning the New York Giants’ star player, Kavyon Thibodeaux, for now.While there have been reports that the New York Giants might be in no mood for trading Kavyon Thibodeaux, ESPN’s Adam Schefter opened up about how he might still attract a lot of interest even as his performance suffered in the last few seasons.Kavyon Thibodeaux experienced an injury plagued season both in 2024 and 2025 as he struggled to show consistency on the field.In the last season, the New York Giants’ star player, Kavyon Thibodeaux, recorded just 2.5 sacks and 25 tackles across 10 games, before being placed on injured reserve in December because of a brutal shoulder injury.Back in 2024, he sustained a wrist injury which led to him missing five games. Kavyon Thibodeaux finished the season with 5.5 sacks, 28 total tackles, 17 quarterback hits, and one forced fumble across 12 games.Though, Kavyon Thibodeaux’s performance has suffered in the last few seasons, it seems many are expecting him to bounce back on the field in the new season.For now, all eyes are on what the Dallas Cowboys plan to do with Kavyon Thibodeaux.
Article Summary: The Dallas Cowboys have had a poor run on the field in the last two seasons with just 7 wins and 10 losses both in 2024 and 2025. Bleacher Report’s Alex Kay predicted that there is a chance that the Dallas Cowboys could make a move for the New York Giants’ star player, Kavyon Thibodeaux.

Article Title: “Nothing prepares you”: Dwyane Wade's wife Gabrielle Union hit by brutal grief as the NBA legend stands by her side
Article Text:
Image via Getty Images

Gabrielle Union makes a heartbreaking post as the NBA legend Dwyane Wade stands by her side through a difficult time



Gabrielle Union spends time with Dwyane Wade and their daughter as they navigate through a difficult time



Dwyane Wade, the Miami Heat legend, has been a strong support to Gabrielle Union through all the dark phases that they have gone through together.Unfortunately, a few weeks ago, the renowned actress Gabrielle Union, suffered a major loss in her life as she lost her father.A few days ago, the “Being Mary Jane” actress Gabrielle Union went public with the tragic passing of her father, Sylvester “Cully” Union Jr., after he fought a brutal fight against dementia for years.Dwyane Wade’s wife posted a heartfelt clip of her father through his younger years as he enjoyed his time with his family and children.The caption of the heartbreaking post reads as, “Yesterday morning, my Dad, Sylvester “Cully” Union Jr., passed away. No matter how much you think you know about dementia, nothing prepares you for the painfully slow disappearing of your loved one.”The “Riff Raff” actress added, “First it’s repeating words or forgetting little things here or there, then BOOM, he can’t swallow or walk. The them that you know gets smaller and smaller. You hold out hope for sustained eye contact or a smile;”Dwyane Wade’s wife, Gabrielle Union continued, “Even a hand squeeze can make you feel like they could come back to you “normal” at any second.It’s brutal and it’s what he experienced, but it wasn’t who he was.”Over the last few years, Gabrielle Union has been public about how her father’s dementia had affected his everyday life and how it was heartbreaking for her to see him going through such a difficult time in his life.The popular actress has also been vocal about how the rising healthcare costs related to her father’s memory care had made her more conscious about her earnings and spendings.While Gabrielle Union is grieving her father’s tragic death, she has been public about how she has kept herself busy with the company of her husband and their daughter.The NBA legend, Dwyane Wade, has been a strong source of support to the popular actress.
Article Summary: The Miami Heat legend has been a strong support to Gabrielle Union through all the dark phases that they have gone through together. The popular actress has been public about how her father’s dementia had affected his everyday life and how it was heartbreaking for her to see him going through such a difficult time in his life.

Article Title: Candace Owens hit with “secret link” allegations after Laura Loomer’s explosive post
Article Text:
Laura Loomer accused Candace Owens of receiving money from the Southern Poverty Law Center, sparking widespread online debate. The claims surfaced as the nonprofit faces allegations of fraud and funding extremist informants. Social media users amplified the accusations without verified proof. Meanwhile, officials, including Kash Patel, outlined serious charges against the SPLC, which the organization has denied.

Watch Candace Owens Questions Erika Kirk’s Past, Drops Kanye West Angle Candace Owens Questions Erika Kirk’s Past, Drops Kanye West Angle

Laura Loomer’s accusation links Candace Owens to SPLC as probe sparks debate







There's a new controversy brewing, as Laura Loomer has accused Candace Owens of being paid by the Southern Poverty Law Center. The charge came as the nonprofit was facing serious allegations that it had funded extremist informants. Loomer’s pointed statement was quickly spread around the internet, leading to heated responses and speculation about hidden political allegiances.The narrative grew when social media users shared unverified claims and screenshots they believed showed connections. Some even wondered if other conservatives might be involved. Despite the viral momentum, no confirmed evidence has substantiated these allegations. But the situation has cast both Owens and the nonprofit under a harsher spotlight, turning it into a larger debate about credibility, funding and influence in political discourse.Laura Loomer accused Candace Owens of receiving money from SPLC. She said, "Was the SPLC paying Candace Owens $500,000 a year to plagiarize David Duke?”A few other social media users pointed to alleged links between Owens and SPLC. One wrote,, "How much money is Candace Owens taking in from the SPLC.I was wondering how she was getting away with that talk on YouTube. Its all making sense now.”Another wrote, "So how long before it's made public that Nick Fuentes is on the payroll of the SPLC? Or Dan Blizarian, or Ian Carroll, or Candace Owens?" A third wrote, “Did SPLC have a thing for Candace Owens? Hmm."The situation gained further weight after Kash Patel addressed serious accusations against the Southern Poverty Law Center. He stated, “The Southern Poverty Law Center, in a massive, sweeping indictment, has been charged with allegations of fraud and using the banking system to perpetrate that fraud. I just want to talk about a couple of brief things here."Patel added, "The Southern Poverty Law Center themselves advertise to raise money to dismantle violent extremist groups for a period of at least a decade. They used their donor network to raise money to purportedly dismantle violent extremist groups.”Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche has also referenced charges that include fraud and money laundering. The SPLC, however, has denied wrongdoing and maintains that its informant program was designed to track extremist activity, not support it.Claims and counterclaims and online speculation continue to clash but the story points to a larger problem. In the fast-paced digital environment of today, allegations can spread before the facts are fully established, leaving public opinion in limbo.
Article Summary: Laura Loomer accused Candace Owens of receiving money from the Southern Poverty Law Center. The claims surfaced as the nonprofit faces allegations of fraud and funding extremist informants. Social media users amplified the accusations without verified proof. The situation has cast both Owens and the nonprofit under a harsher spotlight.

Article Title: Jon Jones trolls Kamaru Usman and WWE retired legend Brock Lesnar with outrageous “getting hand raised at both of you in one night” claim
Article Text:
Jon Jones (Image Source: Getty)

Jon Jones fires back with bold claim after Kamaru Usman backs Brock Lesnar

Watch Henry Cejudo Addresses Pulling Out of RAF 08, Arman Tsarukyan & Sterling vs. Zalal | Pound4Pound Henry Cejudo Addresses Pulling Out of RAF 08, Arman Tsarukyan & Sterling vs. Zalal | Pound4Pound

The debate over a fantasy wrestling match between Jon Jones and Brock Lesnar has taken a sharp turn after Kamaru Usman shared his opinion. Speaking on his podcast, Usman backed Lesnar to win such a contest. His reasoning was simple. He pointed to Lesnar’s massive size and elite wrestling background. The former UFC welterweight champion suggested that those factors would be too much for Jones to handle in a pure wrestling setting.Jones did not stay silent for long. The former UFC light heavyweight champion responded strongly on social media. He dismissed Usman’s view and turned the conversation into something much bigger. Instead of just defending himself, Jones issued a bold statement. He claimed he could defeat both Usman and Lesnar on the same night. His reaction quickly caught attention across the combat sports world and added fuel to an already exciting debate.Jon Jones made it clear that he strongly disagrees with Kamaru Usman’s take. Usman had earlier explained that Brock Lesnar’s size and grinding style would give him the advantage.He described Lesnar as someone who may not constantly attack with traditional shots but can wear opponents down over time. Usman also suggested that taking down a man of Lesnar’s size repeatedly would be extremely difficult.However, Jones responded with confidence and intensity. In his social media message, he said that not only would he beat Lesnar, but he would also defeat Usman in the same night. His statement showed that he believes his skill set is far superior, even against bigger opponents.This exchange comes at a time when Jones’ future remains uncertain. He recently stepped back from a retirement decision, leaving fans unsure about his next move. At the same time, Brock Lesnar’s status in combat sports is also unclear. The legendary wrestler recently retired from WWE after Wrestlemania 42. However, there is still speculation about a possible return.Meanwhile, Jones has already rejected another potential wrestling challenge. Daniel Cormier had proposed a high-stakes wrestling match with a cash bet. Jones turned it down, saying their rivalry has already been settled in the past.Even though this matchup between Jones and Lesnar remains hypothetical, the discussion has created major buzz. Fans continue to debate who would truly win. For now, Jones has made one thing clear. He is not backing down from any challenge, real or imagined.
Article Summary: Jon Jones fires back with bold claim after Kamaru Usman backs Brock Lesnar to win. Former UFC light heavyweight champion responded strongly on social media. He claimed he could defeat both Usman and Lesnar on the same night. This exchange comes at a time when Jones’ future remains uncertain.

Article Title: Andy Reid Kansas City Chiefs: Tornado warning sparks disruption during NFL Draft 2026 in Kansas City as Andy Reid and Chiefs staff move to safety shelter
Article Text:
Tornado warning sparks disruption during NFL Draft 2026 in Kansas City as Andy Reid and Chiefs staff move to safety shelter (Getty)

Andy Reid confirms draft room doubles as shelter as Chiefs adjust during tornado warning in Kansas City



The NFL Draft 2026 in Kansas City faced an unexpected pause on Thursday night when a tornado warning moved across the area. The Kansas City Chiefs were in the middle of their draft operations when weather alerts forced an immediate change in plans. Andy Reid and his staff left the draft room and shifted into a safer interior space inside the same facility.The situation came right when the Chiefs were preparing key draft decisions. Instead of focusing on picks, the front office followed safety instructions and moved into the designated shelter area. The draft room itself sits in the center of the building and also serves as a safe zone. Even during the disruption, the team stayed inside, tracked updates on screens, and continued communication while the storm passed outside.The situation unfolded when severe weather alerts triggered a controlled safety response inside the Kansas City Chiefs facility. Staff members quickly moved away from open areas after security issued the warning. Andy Reid and the entire front office relocated to the interior draft room, which also functions as a shelter space within the building.Reid explained the setup during his post-round media availability on the same night.“The draft room is in the middle of the building. It’s actually one of the shelter spots, so we all just went in there,” he told reporters. His comment made it clear the move was part of an established safety plan, not a panic reaction.General manager Brett Veach also spoke about the moment during his media interaction at the NFL Draft 2026 coverage in Kansas City. He said security personnel informed him of the tornado warning, which forced everyone to relocate immediately. Veach added that the team followed all safety protocols. He noted that while it disrupted his routine, the building’s structure and planning helped the group stay calm and organized.“I don’t like staying in the draft room. I like going into my office. He came in and said there’s a tornado warning, and we all have to go into the draft room… we followed all the safety protocols for sure,” Veach said.Despite the interruption, the Kansas City Chiefs continued their draft process from inside the shelter area. The front office remained active, reviewed options, and stayed engaged as the storm passed.At the end of the night, conditions stabilized and the draft resumed normally in Kansas City. The situation stood out not because of chaos, but because the Chiefs managed a weather disruption without breaking focus during one of the biggest nights of the NFL calendar
Article Summary: The NFL Draft 2026 in Kansas City faced an unexpected pause on Thursday night when a tornado warning moved across the area. The Kansas City Chiefs were in the middle of their draft operations when weather alerts forced an immediate change in plans. Andy Reid and his staff left the draft room and shifted into a safer interior space inside the same facility.

After nine thrilling matches last week, a trend is beginning to emerge on which teams are on a roll and which are still struggling to settle into the new season. So far, 15 matches have been played in the new season of the IPL , and four teams have already set the early marker in the race for the playoffs.With four wins in four matches, Rajasthan Royals sit at the top of the points table. Punjab Kings are at second after two wins and a no result due to rain. They are followed by defending champions Royal Challengers Bengaluru, Delhi Capitals and Lucknow Super Giants, who have two wins each so far. Meanwhile, Chennai Super Kings and Kolkata Knight Riders are two winless teams in IPL 2026.With a win each, Sunrisers Hyderabad, Mumbai Indians, and Gujarat Titans have opened their account in the standings and will look to challenge the top four in coming fixtures.The ongoing IPL season has already witnessed multiple weather disruptions across the country. The KKR vs PBKS clash in Kolkata was washed out, while the RR vs MI encounter had to be curtailed to just 11 overs per side in which Rajasthan Royals outclassed Mumbai Indians by 27 runs. And on Wednesday, GT held their nerves to beat hosts DC by one run in a last-ball thriller.KKR lost their 3rd match in a row after Mukul Choudhary pulled off a record breaking chase for LSG in the last-ball thriller.Rajasthan Royals and Royal Challengers Bengaluru, face off in Guwahati on Friday.The weekend double-headers will see Punjab Kings take on Sunrisers Hyderabad and Chennai Super Kings face Delhi Capitals on Saturday, followed by Lucknow Super Giants vs Gujarat Titans and Mumbai Indians vs Royal Challengers Bengaluru on Sunday.There is likely to be plenty of shuffling in the points table this week.

Article Title: Not the record RCB wanted: Sai Sudharsan's century leaves defending champions with unwanted IPL record
Article Text:
Photo/Agencies

Most individual centuries conceded by a team in IPL:

15 – RCB

14 – Kolkata Knight Riders

14 – Mumbai Indians

11 – Chennai Super Kings, Sunrisers Hyderabad

10 – Rajasthan Royals, Punjab Kings

Watch Ashwani Kumar opens up on Mumbai Indians' win, team mindset Ashwani Kumar opens up on Mumbai Indians' win, team mindset

Royal Challengers Bengaluru made an unwanted IPL record on Friday after Gujarat Titans batter Sai Sudharsan scored a century against them at the M Chinnaswamy Stadium in IPL 2026 match.With Sudharsan’s hundred, RCB became the team to concede the most individual centuries in IPL history.Sudharsan returned to form with a 57-ball century, his third in the IPL, and his first of the 2026 season. Opening the innings with captain Shubman Gill, he built a 128-run stand for the first wicket after RCB chose to bowl first.His innings gave Gujarat a strong base for a big score.Sudharsan also entered the IPL record books on Friday by becoming the fastest batter to complete 2,000 runs in the tournament.The GT opener reached the milestone in just 47 innings, going past Chris Gayle, who had taken 48 innings to get to 2,000 IPL runs.Sudharsan came into the match needing 72 runs to break the record. With this knock, he took his overall tally beyond 2,000 runs.Batting first, Gujarat Titans finished on 205/5 in 20 overs, with RCB bowlers managing to control things better in the death overs after Sudharsan’s hundred.Earlier, Royal Challengers Bengaluru skipper Rajat Patidar won the toss and opted to bowl against Gujarat Titans in their IPL clash here on Friday.English batter Jacob Bethell is set for his first match of the season after being picked in place of an injured Phil Salt in the only change to the lineup for RCB.Shubman Gil-led GT made a couple of changes, handing a debut to Windies pace bowling allrounder Jason Holder while Manav Suthar also returned to the XI.
Article Summary: Royal Challengers Bengaluru concede the most individual centuries in IPL history. Gujarat Titans batter Sai Sudharsan scored a century against RCB. He also became the fastest batter to complete 2,000 runs in the tournament. RCB won the toss and opted to bowl against Gujarat Titans.

Article Title: Luka Doncic Injury Update: Why Luka Doncic isn't playing for Los Angeles Lakers tonight vs. Houston Rockets? Injury update on Los Angeles star ahead of Game 3
Article Text:
Luka Doncic wont be playing tonight (Image via Imagn Images)

Lakers aim to take control in Game 3 as Luka Doncic remains sidelined

It was unexpected that the Los Angeles Lakers would start their first-round playoff series against the Houston Rockets with a 2-0 advantage. Now, the Lakers are preparing for a pivotal Game 3 matchup with the Houston Rockets. But without Luka Doncic, their leading scorer, Los Angeles has had to adjust to life without him.Many thought the short-handed No. 4 seed was doomed. However, the Lakers are only two victories away from making it to the Western Conference semifinals because to back-to-back outstanding games from shooter Luke Kennard and age-defying contributions from LeBron James.Although they don't exactly need to win Game 3, Los Angeles has to take a dominating 3-0 lead because they are short-handed. Naturally, the Rockets want to avoid that by getting their offense back on track.Without superstar Kevin Durant, they shot only 38% in Game 1, and their performance wasn't any better with him. In Game 2, Houston scored just 94 points on just 40% of their field goals. In his comeback, Durant did score 23 points.Unfortunately for the Lakers, Doncic has already been ruled out for the upcoming postseason matchup, so they will still be without him on Friday night when they play the Rockets in Game 3.A new update was given by Shams Charania of ESPN. Doncic isn't anticipated to play in this series against the Rockets, he said.That is a setback for Los Angeles, but with the Rockets leading 2-0 and successfully defending home court, all the emphasis is on them. Reaves might be able to make a comeback if the series goes to six or seven games.Shams claims that Reaves is getting closer to making a comeback than Doncic. The ideal situation for Los Angeles would be to win either Game 3 or Game 4 and finish the series in Game 5 back in Los Angeles.There would have been far more stress going into Friday if Los Angeles had lost either of their first two playoff games against the Rockets. Not having Doncic in the lineup isn't the end of the world, either, since the Lakers have total control over the series and, really, just need one road victory to feel secure about finishing it.The Lakers' ultimate objective is to easily defeat the Rockets in the first round so that Doncic has enough time to recuperate before playing again. The Lakers are following the plan thus far, and it is already helping them.
Article Summary: The Los Angeles Lakers lead the Houston Rockets 2-0 in their first-round playoff series. Luka Doncic has been ruled out for the upcoming postseason matchup. Luke Kennard and LeBron James have had outstanding games in the series so far.

Article Title: Quote of the day by Jeff Bezos: “I’m listening to my body as a signal that something is wrong, and I find that the stress goes away the second I take the first step.”
Article Text:
Quote of the day by Jeff Bezos

“I’m listening to my body as a signal that something is wrong, and I find that the stress goes away the second I take the first step.”

Quote of the day by Jeff Bezos



“I’m listening to my body as a signal that something is wrong, and I find that the stress goes away the second I take the first step.”



What is the meaning behind the quote by Jeff Bezos



Why stress builds up before action



The role of small actions in reducing pressure



How this idea applies in daily life



A closer look at Jeff Bezos’ perspective



The connection between action and mental clarity



Real-life examples of this principle



Why this message remains relevant today



Lessons that can be applied in everyday situations



Final takeaway from the quote







This quote from Jeff Bezos makes a simple but important point about how people deal with stress and uncertainty. When tasks are put off, decisions are put off, or problems are ignored, stress can build up in everyday life. Many people feel restless, tired, or worried, but they don't always know what these feelings mean. Bezos says that these signals can be warnings that tell people to do something instead of avoiding it. The quote also talks about a useful solution: starting. When someone starts to work on a problem, the pressure often goes down. This idea is useful in work, school, and personal life because taking the first step can make even the biggest problems seem less scary. Understanding this point of view helps us understand why taking action, even a small one, can be better than thinking too much or putting things off.The quote talks about two important things: being aware and taking action. First, it says to pay attention to what your body is saying. Stress is not just a mental state; it is also a physical reaction.When something isn't right, people might feel tense, uncomfortable, or uneasy. These signals can mean that a task is still open, a choice needs to be made, or something needs to be looked into.The second half of the quote is about taking the first step. Getting started is often the hardest part of any job. The mind becomes more focused, and the uncertainty goes down once someone starts. This change from thinking to doing is a big part of what helps lower stress.The quote doesn't say that problems go away right away. It shows that doing something about the problem changes how a person feels about it. Starting gives you a sense of control, which naturally lowers stress.In a lot of cases, stress goes up when things are late. If you don't finish a task or put it off, it stays on your mind. This constant reminder can make you feel like you have to do something. For instance, unfinished tasks, decisions that need to be made, or problems that haven't been solved can make you think without making any progress.Studies in psychology often show that stress comes from not knowing what's going to happen and not being able to control things. People feel unsure about what will happen when they don't do anything. This uncertainty can make things seem worse than they are.A person starts to lessen that uncertainty by taking the first step, even if it is small. Instead of worrying about what could happen, the brain starts to think about what it can do. This change is very important for lowering stress.The quote shows how important it is to start things instead of finishing them all at once. When you look at a task as a whole, it can seem too big to handle. But if you break them down into smaller steps, they are easier to deal with.Starting a project, making a phone call, or writing the first few lines of a task are all examples of things that can get things going. The mind adapts and goes on with less trouble once the process starts.People are often told to start with small, manageable steps when they use this method in productivity techniques. These little steps help you move forward, and moving forward makes you less stressed.You can see the meaning of the quote in many parts of life. Deadlines or a lot of work can make employees feel stressed at work. Starting with one thing at a time can help lower that stress.Students often feel stressed out before tests or assignments in school. Even a small step toward getting ready early can make the work seem less heavy.When you put off making decisions about your finances, health, or conflicts in your personal life, they can be stressful. Taking the first step toward solving them often makes things better right away.People know Jeff Bezos for starting Amazon, which is one of the biggest companies in the world. His way of leading often puts a lot of emphasis on making decisions, taking action, and thinking about the long term.Bezos has talked about how important it is to take the lead and not wait for the right conditions throughout his career. His quote shows this way of thinking, which says that action is better than waiting.There is often uncertainty when making decisions in business. If you wait too long, you might miss out on chances, but if you take the first step, you can move forward and learn. You can see this way of thinking in how Amazon grew into new businesses over time.One important thing about the quote is how doing something makes things clearer. People who think too much without doing anything can end up with thoughts that go in circles and don't help them. This can make things more confusing and stressful.Doing something helps you get your thoughts in order. It gives you real information about what's going on, which makes things less uncertain. For instance, beginning a task can show what is easy and what is hard, which can help with planning.This link between doing something and feeling clear is why so many people feel better after starting something they were putting off.The quote's idea can be seen in everyday life. Someone who puts off a conversation may feel anxious, but starting the conversation often makes that anxiety go away. Someone who puts off a task may also feel stressed, but starting the work can help them feel better.In the workplace, leaders often tell their teams to get started instead of waiting for the perfect plan. This method keeps things moving forward and stops things from getting behind.The same idea holds for health and fitness. Taking small steps, like going for a short walk or doing a simple task, can help you feel less stressed about bigger goals.People have to handle many things at once in today's fast-paced world. This can cause stress, especially when tasks are put off or skipped. The quote gives a simple way to deal with these kinds of problems.It suggests that instead of looking at the whole problem, you should look at the first step. This method is useful and can be used right away. You don't need complicated tools or planning to do it.The message is also important for mental health. People can better handle their work and emotions if they know how to recognise stress signals and take action.The quote gives useful advice that can be used in everyday life. It makes people more aware of their mental and physical health. It also encourages people to take action to deal with stress.People can lower their stress levels by concentrating on starting things instead of finishing everything at once. This method helps keep things consistent and moving forward.The quote also shows how important it is to pay attention to warning signs. If you listen to your body and do what it says, you can keep stress from building up.Jeff Bezos said, “I’m listening to my body as a signal that something is wrong, and I find that the stress goes away the second I take the first step.” This is a clear and useful way to deal with stress. It talks about how being aware of something and acting on it can help you relax and focus better.In a lot of cases, stress gets worse when you put off doing something. The first step helps the mind move from worrying to making progress. This small change can make problems seem less overwhelming.The quote's message is clear: pay attention to the signs, do something, and move on. People can get things done better and cut down on stress in their daily lives by using this method.
Article Summary: “I’m listening to my body as a signal that something is wrong, and I find that the stress goes away the second I take the first step.” Jeff Bezos makes a simple but important point about how people deal with stress and uncertainty. When someone starts to work on a problem, the pressure often goes down.

Article Title: El Niño in May-June to hit temperature and rainfall, says World Meteorological Organization
Article Text:
World Meteorological Organization warns El Niño may reduce rainfall May–July (Image used for representational purpose only)

Poll What aspect of climate change do you think El Nino will affect the most? Agriculture Water resources Energy supply Health

NEW DELHI: Predicting a climatic condition that may further aggravate adverse weather in South Asia, including India, World Meteorological Organisation Friday said an El Nino event is expected to develop as early as May-July, impacting "global temperature and rainfall patterns". Earlier, this condition was expected to develop in the second half of the monsoon season (Aug-Sept).El Nino events, which typically occur every 2-7 years and last around 9-12 months, affect temperature and rain patterns in different regions and typically have a warming effect on the global climate. Amid growing risk of El Nino, IMD has already predicted "below normal" monsoon rainfall in India.The latest monthly global seasonal climate update from WMO signals a clear shift in the equatorial Pacific where sea-surface temperatures are rising rapidly, pointing to a likely return of El Nino conditions next month.El Nino is characterised by warming of ocean surface temperatures in the central and eastern Equatorial Pacific.“For the May-June-July season, land surface temperatures are expected to be above-normal nearly everywhere,” said WMO, noting that the seasonal forecasts are vital to guide preparedness actions, especially in climate-sensitive sectors like agriculture, water resource management, energy and health.“After a period of neutral conditions at the start of the year, climate models are now strongly aligned, and there is high confidence in the onset of El Nino, followed by further intensification in the months that follow,” said Wilfran Moufouma Okia, chief of climate prediction at WMO.
Article Summary: An El Nino event is expected to develop as early as May-July, says World Meteorological Organization. Earlier, this condition was expected to developed in the second half of the monsoon season (Aug-Sept) IMD has already predicted "below normal" monsoon rainfall in India. The latest monthly global seasonal climate update signals a clear shift in the equatorial Pacific.

Article Title: Dan Ticktum calls Formula E GEN4 a “proper-looking” race car: “It is very, very, very fast”
Article Text:
Dan Ticktum (Image credit: Instagram)

Dan Ticktum introduces Formula E GEN4 car in his own style



Formula E fans react to GEN4 car



The Formula E GEN4 car has been making all the right noises since its grand reveal in France earlier this week. Drivers across the grid have been impressed with the next-generation machine, which is set to debut next season. Among them, Cupra Kiro’s Dan Ticktum shared his thoughts on the GEN4 in his own distinctive style, praising both its looks and its sheer performance.Taking to Instagram, Dan Ticktum shared a video introducing the GEN4 car and captioned it: “The new GEN4 car: very good very nice @fiaformulae #cars #speed #power.”Standing alongside the car with a drink in hand, he described it in his own words. He began: “Hello chaps and chapesses, you join me with a cocktail in the south of France. More importantly, you join me for this, which is the new Formula E car, the GEN4 car. Headline stats compared to the predecessor - that was about 450 horsepower; this is just over 800 horsepower. 0-60 in about 1.7-1.8 seconds.Permanent four-wheel drive, one of the only single-seaters ever to have permanent four-wheel drive, certainly at this level. Weight, we’re about 1,000 kilos - a bit heavier than I would have hoped, but it’s still pretty light.”Clearly impressed, he added, “I’ve seen very few cars that have shocked me on a race track before. Normally, you go to watch race cars or any cars on track and your head sort of makes a perceived, automatic movement. There are very few cars that surprise you when they go by. That was one of them. It’s got over 800 horsepower all of the time - it hasn’t got a rev range or anything. It is very, very, very f***ing fast, is how I would describe it. A few of my colleagues have already driven it. I haven’t, but I’m very much looking forward to doing so.”Comparing it to the current GEN3 Evo, he said: “I think this is a big step in the right direction for Formula E. One of the main things is how the car looks. We nicknamed the GEN3 car the ‘Dorito’. This is a proper-looking race car.”He continued, “So yeah, loads of downforce. It’s going to have two aero packages - one high downforce, one low downforce, with the low downforce setup for races to be more efficient. We’re even expecting this car, which isn’t on slicks, to be faster than Formula 2 around Monaco. Hopefully, by GEN4 or GEN5 in a couple of years’ time, when it’s on slicks, we’ll be knocking on the door of F1. It’s a proper bit of kit, and congratulations to everyone who’s made that happen because it’s f***ing cool. ”Fans also reacted to Dan Ticktum’s introduction of the GEN4 car. “At least the battery charger is better than F1,” wrote one fan. Another commented: “GEN4 giving F1 a good excuse to go back to V10s. Why bother trying to do what FE is doing better.” A third fan added: “Formula E really saw F1 struggling to nail the new generation of power units and said, ‘here, hold my beer’, and produced a monster.”Formula E is set to return with Rounds 7 and 8 in Berlin, with the double-header taking place from 1-3 May.Also read: Exclusive interview: Edoardo Mortara shines for Mahindra Racing this season, says “important to keep your feet on the ground”
Article Summary: Formula E driver Dan Ticktum shares his thoughts on the GEN4 car on Instagram. He praises its looks and performance, saying it is'very, very, very f***ing fast' The GEN4 is set to debut next season and is expected to be faster than Formula 2.
