Article Title: “He felt it wasn’t authentic”: Travis Kelce reportedly questioned Taylor Swift’s bond with Blake Lively and Ryan Reynolds long before things turned sour
Article Text:
Travis Kelce reportedly questioned Taylor Swift’s bond with Blake Lively and Ryan Reynolds long before things turned sour.(Image via Getty Images)

Travis Kelce reportedly did not want to hang out with Blake Lively and Ryan Reynolds alongside Taylor Swift



Taylor Swift remains busy as Travis Kelce goes vocal with his professional commitments



Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have had a pretty strong bond as they continue to hang out with each other’s friends and siblings.While things have taken a wrong turn between Taylor Swift and Blake Lively, it seems the Kansas City Chiefs’ star player, Travis Kelce, was never a big fans of the bond they once had.A few weeks ago, as per Rob Shuter, a source revealed, “He hated the double-dating…”The source added, “He felt like it was all optics and no authenticity” and didn’t want forced hangouts or performative friendships.”To make it worse, more than Blake Lively, it seems Travis Kelce had issues with her husband, the popular Hollywood actor Ryan Reynolds as he reportedly struggled to “trust him” and maintained distance from him.However, both Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have maintained their fair share of distance from anything related to the power couple in Hollywood, Blake Lively and Ryan Reynolds.For now, all that the billionaire pop star, Taylor Swift, is focusing on is their wedding as Travis Kelce remains busy with his work commitments.While Taylor Swift has remained private in the last few days, Travis Kelce announced his podcast, New Heights, will be hosted live in Los Angeles in June 2026.The Kansas City Chiefs’ star player also opened up about NFL Draft in a recent episode as he shares the type of players that the team should recruit.The popular tight end said, “I’m just hoping for a guy that loves ball, man. I think one of the things that you just want to have when you get back into the building after a season like last year, man, you just want guys that love what they’re [expletive] doing.”Travis Kelce added, “I think it’s one of the things that I look for in these young guys when they come in, is just how infectious is your energy? I need that out of these young guys.”While Travis Kelce has been public about his work life, he has not hinted at any details about his high profile wedding to Taylor Swift.
Article Summary: Travis Kelce reportedly questioned Taylor Swift’s bond with Blake Lively and Ryan Reynolds long before things turned sour. The Kansas City Chiefs’ star player also opened up about NFL Draft in a recent episode as he shares the type of players that the team should recruit.

Article Title: NFL Trade Rumor: Green Bay Packers could target $11M former Los Angeles Rams' backup as veteran upgrade after inconsistent season
Article Text:
Green Bay Packers could target $11M former Los Angeles Rams backup as veteran upgrade after inconsistent season.(Image via X)

Green Bay Packers linked to former Los Angeles Rams ’ backup QB Jimmy Garoppolo



The Green Bay Packers’ performance in the last season dipped since 2024 as the team finished the season with 9 wins and 8 losses.As the Green Bay Packers lost the Wild Card round to the Chicago Bears, all eyes are on the next season as the team focuses on its roster.A few hours ago, Bleacher Report’s Zach Bachar predicted that the Green Bay Packers could make a move for the former Los Angeles Rams’ player, Jimmy Garoppolo.Bleacher Report’s Zach Bachar noted in a recent report, “Green Bay still has Desmond Ridder on its roster, but Ridder has been inconsistent when give extended playing time throughout his NFL career. As the Packers look to enter the NFC playoff picture once again, they could choose to bring in a veteran passer instead.”Bleacher Report’s Zach Bachar added, “Garoppolo may be a strong fit in Green Bay given his experience playing under McVay. Packers head coach Matt LaFleur was previously on McVay's coaching staff, serving as the Rams' offensive coordinator in 2017.”However, the Green Bay Packers have maintained their distance from trade talks concerning Jimmy Garoppolo.Interestingly, the Los Angeles Rams are keen to re-sign Jimmy Garoppolo after his performance suffered in the last two seasons.A week ago, as per Stu Jackson of the team's official website, the Los Angeles Rams’ head coach, Sean McVay opened up about Jimmy Garoppolo as he said, "Hey, I'd love to have Jimmy Garoppolo back with us…”The popular head coach added, "That's a big deal for us. He's earned the right to be able to take his time and do whatever he wants."But Jimmy Garoppolo has stayed silent as he deals with speculations of a potential retirement after a poor run on the field in the last two seasons.In the last season, Jimmy Garoppolo played in only three games after signing a one year deal worth $11 million with the Los Angeles Rams.Jimmy Garoppolo did not attempt a pass as his appearances were limited to kneel-downs to seal victories.In 2024, Jimmy Garoppolo missed the preseason as he was suspended from the first two games of the regular season for violating the league's performance-enhancing drug policy.For now, all eyes are on what Jimmy Garoppolo chooses to do next with his career amid retirement rumors.
Article Summary: Green Bay Packers could target $11M former Los Angeles Rams backup as veteran upgrade after inconsistent season. Green Bay Packers lost the Wild Card round to the Chicago Bears. Jimmy Garoppolo played in only three games after signing a one year deal worth $11 million with the LA Rams.

Article Title: ‘It’s against nature’: Cristiano Ronaldo’s former chef reveals why he doesn't drink milk, shares daily diet
Article Text:
Cristiano Ronaldo avoids milk entirely, former chef reveals strict diet behind elite longevity/ Image:Instagram

Why milk is excluded from his diet

Structure of Ronaldo’s daily diet

Ronaldo maintains under 10% body fat, avoids refined sugar, milk, and focuses on strict recovery routines/ Instagram

Physical condition and recovery routine

Ronaldo’s recovery routine includes intense sauna sessions and ice baths to maintain peak fitness and longevity/Instagram

Comparison with other players’ diets

Despite milk often being touted as a superdrink rich in protein, calcium and essential vitamins, and widely used by athletes for recovery and muscle support, Cristiano Ronaldo has avoided it as part of his long-standing diet, according to his former private chef, a choice that has aligned with the discipline behind his longevity into a 25th professional season.The 41-year-old, now at Al-Nassr, is closing in on 1,000 career goals after scoring his 969th in a win last weekend. Across spells with Manchester United and Real Madrid, Ronaldo has consistently pointed to discipline in diet and recovery as central to maintaining peak physical condition.Ronaldo’s former chef Giorgio Barone explained that milk is completely removed from his routine, not for performance reasons alone but because of a broader view about consumption.“No milk,” Barone told Covers.com, before outlining the reasoning in detail: “Humans are the only animals that drink the milk of other animals. No other animal drinks milk after three months. Calves don’t drink milk after the age of three months. Animals don’t drink the milk of other animals.“It does not exist in nature. Only human beings continue to drink milk up to 30, 40, 50, and 60 years, and in my view it is wrong. We breastfeed from our mothers, like dogs, wolves, cows and donkeys.It is normal.“After infancy it is not normal. It is against nature.”Barone described Ronaldo’s diet as controlled but varied, built around consistency rather than restriction for its own sake.“Cristiano Ronaldo’s diet is balanced,” he said. “He eats a little bit of everything, but it’s always healthy.”He then detailed how that plays out across the day: “Starting with breakfast, he would have an avocado with coffee, eggs and no sugar. Absolutely no sugar. Lunch could be chicken, fish and always vegetables. If he needs carbohydrates, he gets them through vegetables, so he doesn’t need anything made with flour.“Nothing like pasta, bread and other types of food. In the evening, he eats light foods, usually fish or meat in the form of fillet. It’s always accompanied by vegetables.”The approach removes refined sugar entirely and avoids flour-based carbohydrates, relying instead on protein, vegetables and healthy fats.That structure is reflected in Ronaldo’s physical condition, with body fat levels maintained below 10 per cent.His routine extends beyond diet, incorporating recovery methods such as saunas and ice baths, which he and his partner Georgina Rodriguez are known to use regularly.The same discipline has been visible in public moments as well. During the 2021 European Championship, Ronaldo moved a bottle of Coca-Cola away from a press conference table and told viewers to “drink water,” a moment that wiped billions off the company’s market value.Barone also addressed comparisons with Erling Haaland, who has spoken about drinking raw milk as part of his own routine.While rejecting milk, Barone agreed with other elements of that approach, particularly the inclusion of organ meats: “I agree with [Erling Haaland’s diet of] eating the organs. The liver, heart and brain are all healthy foods. They are superfoods. Cristiano liked liver too. I love it. It’s very rich in iron, and it’s important in the diet, so for the organs, I approve, but not for the milk.”
Article Summary: Cristiano Ronaldo's former chef Giorgio Barone reveals strict diet behind elite longevity. Ronaldo avoids refined sugar, milk, and focuses on strict recovery routines. The 41-year-old is closing in on 1,000 career goals after scoring his 969th in a win last weekend.

Article Title: Austin Reaves Injury Update: Is Austin Reaves playing tonight? Los Angeles Lakers guard listed questionable for Game 3 vs Houston Rockets
Article Text:
Los Angeles Lakers' shooting guard Austin Reaves (Image via: Getty Images)

Austin Reaves recovery timeline explained as Los Angeles Lakers manage his return vs. the Houston Rockets

The NBA Playoffs have officially begun, and as the first round moves locations, the passion is building to a fever pitch. Six of the eight series are locked in close contests as of last night. Both the Minnesota Timberwolves and the Atlanta Hawks defeated the Knicks and Nuggets in a crucial Game 3 victory.With a 2-1 advantage, they were in a strong position to go back on the road and try to win. SG Austin Reaves of the Los Angeles Lakers is presently listed as questionable for Friday's NBA playoff game between the Lakers and Rockets on Prime Video at 8:00 p.m. ET.The Lakers have won their first two games without Austin Reaves, their main scorer, defying the odds. Since April 2, he has been out of commission. The NBA's top scorer (33.5 PPG) is predicted to miss the rest of the first round due to Reaves' devastating loss.But there is a ray of hope for Austin Reaves. Reaves is recuperating much more quickly than Doncic and is listed as questionable for tonight's Game 3 in Houston. He is expected to return for Game 5 in Los Angeles even if he misses the two-game stay in Texas.After sustaining the injury on April 2, he has missed the entire postseason thus far, but his recent improvement shows that he is getting better.The guard is making well in his rehabilitation and has already resumed playing on the floor.His predicament has emerged as one of the series' central narratives, particularly in light of the Lakers' 2-0 lead despite his absence. Depending on how he reacts, a final decision is anticipated closer to tip-off in Game 3.Given Reaves' career-high, his return is crucial to relieving pressure on the rotation. However, in order to prevent any setbacks at a crucial period of the season, the Lakers have adopted a careful approach, keeping him inactive through the early playoff games because oblique injuries are especially sensitive and quick to aggravate.Although Reaves has been out of the lineup for a few weeks due to an oblique injury, Los Angeles Lakers SG Austin Reaves is making progress toward a possible comeback. The NBA's injury report states that Reaves is formally labeled as questionable for Friday's game against the Rockets.Since the Lakers' 139-96 defeat to the Oklahoma City Thunder on April 2, the guard has been sidelined due to a Grade 2 left oblique strain. For Game 3, Reaves was upgraded to doubtful.Reaves might return in Game 3 or Game 4 if he is unable to play on Friday, according to ESPN's Shams Charania. Lakers head coach JJ Redick reportedly told ESPN's Dave McMenamin that Reaves started his return-to-play program earlier this week and took part in one-on-one court work on Tuesday.Reaves has averaged 5.5 assists, 4.7 rebounds, 1.1 steals, and a career-high 23.3 points per game. The guard for the Lakers made 36.0% of his shots from beyond the arc.
Article Summary: Lakers have won their first two games without Austin Reaves, their main scorer, defying the odds. The NBA's top scorer (33.5 PPG) is predicted to miss the rest of the first round due to Reaves' devastating loss. Reaves is recuperating much more quickly than Doncic and is listed as questionable for tonight's Game 3 in Houston.

Article Title: “Three-against-one situation”: El Rubius opens up on being “targeted” in MrBeast’s viral $1M challenge
Article Text:
El Rubius reacted honestly after his elimination from MrBeast’s $1 million challenge, calling it “unfair” and claiming he was targeted in a three-against-one situation. Despite his frustration, he thanked fans and gave away his $50,000 winnings. His response felt real and balanced, especially after MrBeast’s team later sent him a cake, softening the moment.

El Rubius reflects on a tough and “unfair” exit







El Rubius did not just walk away from MrBeast’s $1 million streamer challenge. He opened up. Soon after his elimination, the Spanish creator shared a raw reaction with fans, giving them a closer look at what the experience felt like from inside the game. It was not polished or carefully framed. It felt real, and that is exactly why it caught attention so quickly.The clip and his response have since fueled conversations across the streaming space. Some viewers believe intense competitions like this naturally lead to uneven situations. Others feel Rubius may have had a point about being singled out. Either way, his words have added a human layer to a challenge that many only saw as entertainment.Speaking through an Instagram Story, Rubius did not hide his frustration, but he also made sure to thank his supporters. He said, "Guys, I just got knocked out of the game. It was a bit of an unfair elimination, but hey, at least I managed to walk away with $50,000 for you all, which I’ve already distributed. It went to the mods, the subs, and the non-subs alike."He further added, "I’m happy, of course, though admittedly, it was incredibly tough.I wasn't really a fan of the challenge itself, either. But then again... it was basically a three-against-one situation the entire time. I mean, they were targeting me specifically the whole way through. I kept trying to go after RaKai, but, well, he actually just got eliminated in the end. So, at least justice was served for Abraham. Abraham, if you’re watching this, we were all rooting for you, and standing right there with you."His message carried mixed emotions. There was disappointment, yes, but also pride in how he handled things. Giving away his $50,000 winnings to his community stood out as a gesture that meant more than the result itself.He continued with another honest note, saying, "And in the end, karma finally caught up with that little punk. Sorry, I’m being a bit toxic right now, but let's just hope the MrBeast team doesn't see this! Guys, thank you all so much. Seriously, thank you for all the support and for just being there."He added, "Every time I asked for something in the chat or whatever it was, you guys were right there. You’re incredible. I’m a little disappointed in myself, personally, mostly for not performing better, but hey, I gave it my all, and we still walked away with $50,000, so we’ve got to look on the bright side. All right, guys, big hugs to all my brothers out there!"Interestingly, the story did not end with frustration. Later that day, Rubius revealed that MrBeast’s team had sent him a cake after his exit. It was a small gesture, but it shifted the mood. It showed that even in a high-pressure challenge, there is still room for respect.In the end, Rubius’ reaction felt honest and grounded. That is what stayed with people.
Article Summary: El Rubius was eliminated from MrBeast's $1 million streamer challenge. He called it "unfair" and said he was targeted in a three-against-one situation. Despite his frustration, he thanked fans and gave away his $50,000 winnings.

Article Title: Ipl Ticket Scam: IPL craze costs techie Rs 1.46 lakh in fake RCB vs CSK ticket scam
Article Text:
Image credit: AI generated pic

Watch Devdutt Padikkal press conference: Chinnaswamy pitch, Tim David’s power & RCB’s batting strategy Devdutt Padikkal press conference: Chinnaswamy pitch, Tim David’s power & RCB’s batting strategy

RCB register their second win

Poll Do you think the demand for IPL tickets is too high every season? Yes, it's excessive. No, it's just right.

NEW DELHI: IPL comes and the demand for tickets and passes go soaring up by the fans. The desperation to get inside the stadium to watch their favourite teams in action in the IPL go high and high. When the tickets get sold out, the demand gets too hig, and the cricket fans even ask for tickets in black. But for a 25-year-old techie the craze for IPL tickets for RCB vs CSK turned too costly and he was duped for a massive Rs. 1.46 lakh.The techie, a resident of B Narayanapura, fell into a trap by a post posted by a fraudster who posed himself as a ticket seller on Instagram.As per a report in Deccan Herald, the techie alleged in a complaint to Mahadevapura Police that an individual claiming to be Sumit Biswal promised he could arrange IPL tickets along with food coupons.As per the techie, Biswal was introduced him as a senior supervisor for ticket counter at M Chinnaswamy Stadium"He asked me to come near the stadium gate number 10, saying someone would deliver the tickets within minutes, and even sent an email confirmation to gain my trust," the complainant told Deccan Herald."Initially, I agreed to buy two tickets for Rs 3,700 each,but he kept asking for more money under various pretexts such as refundable security deposits, additional ID cards and food coupons.Trusting him, I made multiple payments - even using my mother’s bank account after exhausting my own limits—and ended up transferring around Rs 1.46 lakh," he added.Bhuvneshwar Kumar’s incisive spell of 3-41, coming after a marauding batting show from Tim David, Rajat Patidar and Devdutt Padikkal, propelled Royal Challengers Bengaluru (RCB) to a commanding 43-run victory over Chennai Super Kings (CSK) in their IPL 2026 encounter at the M Chinnaswamy Stadium on Sunday.The contest saw RCB’s batting unit dismantle CSK’s attack with relentless hitting, as David’s 70 not out off just 25 balls and Patidar’s unbeaten 48 off only 19 balls provided for the late fireworks after Padikkal’s fluent 50 off 29 balls had set the tone for the daunting total.Their combined effort lifted RCB to a daunting 250/3, thus setting a new record for highest total in IPL 2026. In reply, CSK faltered under scoreboard pressure, with Sarfaraz Khan’s 50 off 24 balls and Prashant Veer’s 43 the lone acts of resistance amid a string of failures from the top order.Bhuvneshwar was at his disciplined best and even crossed the 200-mark in terms of wickets in IPL, with others also chipping in as CSK were bowled out for 207 in 19.4 overs. The comprehensive win also meant RCB have registered four consecutive triumphs over CSK for the first time in the IPL’s history.
Article Summary: Royal Challengers Bengaluru (RCB) beat Chennai Super Kings (CSK) in their IPL 2026 encounter at the M Chinnaswamy Stadium on Sunday. Tim David, Rajat Patidar and Devdutt Padikkal put on a marauding batting show to lift RCB to a daunting 250/3. RCB have registered four consecutive triumphs over CSK for the first time in the IPL's history.

Article Title: Clavicular Viral Controversy: "Trans women are.....": Clavicular’s viral moment with trans women sparks fresh conversation on internet culture
Article Text:
A viral clip featuring Clavicular and trans women is gaining attention for its calm and honest tone. The conversation explores how online language and trends move across communities. Instead of conflict, the exchange highlights shared influence and mutual awareness. Viewers are engaging with its thoughtful nature, as it reflects how internet culture evolves through collaboration rather than ownership.

Clavicular and trans women share a surprising realization about online trends







The video of Clavicular, a short-video producer, is going around the Internet, yet not the reason why. There is no yelling or over-the-top drama. It is a mere, everyday talk that seems almost novel nowadays, in the age of internet, which is overflowing with content. The scene is easy-going, the tone of the narrative is straightforward, and the characters appear more concerned with conversation than combat.The message that is being addressed is the flow of the conversation. It discusses internet culture, the way people communicate with one another and the place of trends. Rather than bringing out a debate, the encounter towards curiosity. It quietly brings attention to something that a lot of people who use the internet notice but don't often say out loud. People in different communities often have a bigger impact on each other than they think.The conversation begins with a confident and lighthearted comment from one of the trans women present. She says, "You know that trans women are like the OG lip masters, right? We are very talented in the program. Like, I do the peptides, I'm on Zeta." Her tone carries a mix of pride and humor, setting a relaxed vibe at the table.Clavicular responds in a way that keeps the mood steady but adds a different angle.He says, "That is funny because you guys were using a lot of the words in like the South Korean subreddits in like 2014." It’s not confrontational. If anything, it feels like an observation. He points to how certain words and ideas may have traveled across different online spaces over time.Another voice joins in and brings the moment full circle. "Guys, we're like the OGs. I saw a couple of posts about that. We're like copying each other." That line hits in a simple but honest way. It reflects something familiar. Online culture is rarely created in isolation. It grows through sharing, borrowing, and sometimes even unknowingly repeating.That's what makes the clip so powerful. It doesn't want to make a point or win an argument. It only shows a group of people talking, listening, and figuring something out together.This moment feels different in a space where viral content often leads to fights. It reminds people that conversations can be calm, thoughtful, and still important. And sometimes, that honest silence is what makes it work.
Article Summary: A viral clip featuring Clavicular and trans women is gaining attention for its calm and honest tone. The conversation explores how online language and trends move across communities. Viewers are engaging with its thoughtful nature, as it reflects how internet culture evolves through collaboration.

Article Title: Ronaldo has three final career dreams he must fulfil before retirement, Messi has already completed the first
Article Text:
As Messi takes control of UE Cornellà, he joins Ronaldo in Spanish football as club owners in rival roles.(Image via Getty)

The missing piece: a World Cup title

The race to 1,000 career goals

A different kind of milestone: playing with Cristiano Jr

Current form and final stretch

Poll Do you think Cristiano Ronaldo will lead Portugal to a World Cup victory in 2026? Yes, he will lead them to victory. No, they won't win the World Cup.

At a time when most players are years into retirement and settled into coaching or punditry, 41-year-old Cristiano Ronaldo is choosing his final act carefully, with three clear goals still on his agenda. The Portugal forward is expected to make his sixth appearance at the 2026 FIFA World Cup, which he has indicated will be his last, bringing his career to a close with one final push for legacy, numbers, and something more personal.The most obvious goal is also the one that has defined the final chapter of his international career. Ronaldo has never won a World Cup, despite playing in five editions between 2006 and 2022, making 22 appearances and scoring eight goals. His best finish remains fourth place in 2006.Winning the World Cup is the one major honour missing from his record, and it is also the one already secured by Lionel Messi . That comparison has followed both players for years, and it remains central to how their careers are measured.Portugal are not traditionally among the favourites, and historically have only reached the semi-finals twice, in 1966 and 2006. However, their European Championship win in 2016 serves as a reminder that they can compete beyond expectations.Despite a minor hamstring injury in March 2026 and a previous red-card suspension that was later lifted, Portugal coach Roberto Martínez continues to view Ronaldo as a key part of the squad heading into the tournament.Alongside the international ambition, Ronaldo is also closing in on a statistical milestone that has rarely been approached in football history.He scored his 969th career goal on April 19, 2026, during Al Nassr FC’s 4-0 win over Al Wasl FC in the AFC Champions League 2 quarter-finals, finding the net in the 11th minute. That leaves him within reach of the 1,000-goal mark, a figure that has become a clear personal target.Messi, currently on 905 goals, is also within distance, although the approach appears different. While Ronaldo continues to push towards the milestone, Messi has shown less urgency, even passing up opportunities, including allowing Nicolás Otamendi to take a penalty so he could mark his farewell moment with the national team, a gesture that shows he’s not chasing numbers in the same way.The contrast is not about ability but intent. Ronaldo’s pursuit of 1,000 has become part of his closing narrative, a target he is actively chasing rather than something that might happen along the way.Also read: Could Ronaldo play alongside his son at Al-Nassr next season? Reports say club planning step-up after 16th birthday The third objective is less conventional but equally significant for Ronaldo. There is now a realistic possibility that he could share the pitch at senior level with his son, Cristiano Ronaldo Jr..The idea has gained traction after reports that Al Nassr are considering promoting Ronaldo’s eldest son to the first team. Cristiano Jr. will turn 16 in June, and while that step would still depend on development and timing, the possibility is no longer distant.If it happens, it would place Ronaldo in a rare category of athletes who have competed alongside their children at the highest level. The comparison most often drawn is with LeBron James and Bronny James, who have moved towards a similar milestone in the NBA.In football, such instances are extremely rare, particularly at top-flight level, which is why this objective carries a different kind of weight. It is not tied to trophies or records, but to a moment that would stand on its own in the sport’s history.Ronaldo’s form suggests these targets are not purely symbolic. Even at 41, he continues to influence games and contribute decisively for Al Nassr, maintaining a level that keeps him relevant both at club level and internationally. His current deal with the Saudi club runs until 2027, signed in a record-breaking extension that will keep him there into his 42nd year, with reports placing his earnings at around €200 million per season, along with performance bonuses and commercial add-ons tied to goals and success.On the international front, he remains central to Portugal’s plans for the 2026 FIFA World Cup in June, which is expected to mark the final chapter of his international career. He continues to play a key role in qualifying and leadership within the squad, guiding a younger generation while still leading the attack as they prepare for one last major tournament together.
Article Summary: Cristiano Ronaldo is expected to make his sixth appearance at the 2026 FIFA World Cup, which he has indicated will be his last. The Portugal forward is also closing in on a statistical milestone that has rarely been approached in football history. He scored his 969th career goal on April 19, 2026, during Al Nassr FC’s 4-0 win over Al Wasl FC.

Article Title: Igumdrop: Streamer iGumdrop takes her cooking from Twitch to MasterChef and impresses Gordon Ramsay
Article Text:
Image Via Instagram

iGumdrop impresses Gordon Ramsay with her cooking on MasterChef stage

“incredible.”

“This smells amazing,”

“beautiful,”

“authentic”

“delicious.”







The most well-known Twitch creator iGumdrop has entered into a new level in her career, as she is currently one of the contestants of the sixteenth season of MasterChef. The thing that iGumdrop is well known for is her food recipes which she streams on different social media channels. With over two million followers on platforms such as Twitch, YouTube, and Instagram, she has made a name for herself.Now, she is bringing her cooking skills from the internet to a real-life cooking show. This new season is called MasterChef Global Gauntlet, where home cooks from different parts of the world compete. iGumdrop shared the news with her fans on April 23 through a short video. In the clip, she proudly showed her MasterChef apron, representing Team Asia-Pacific. This moment was very special for her and her followers.In the course of the competition, iGumdrop was lucky enough to have an opportunity to cook in front of the renowned chef Gordon Ramsay. The dish that she prepared was wagyu beef satay in peanut sauce with coconut rice.While cooking, she told Ramsay that she wants to put Malaysian food on the map. Ramsay liked her passion and praised her. He also said her social media following isBut iGumdrop made it clear that she is not there for fame. She said she wants to prove that her food tastes good.As she cooked, Ramsay even said,and told her not to overcook the wagyu. This showed that he was impressed by her dish.The show follows a special format where cooks from different regions compete. Each contestant must earn a white apron to move forward. iGumdrop did just that. She secured her apron for Team Asia-Pacific with her tasty dish.The judges loved her food. Chef Tiffany Derry called her plateand Ramsay said it wasandHer success on the show shows how far she has come from her streaming days.In the end, iGumdrop’s journey from online videos to a big cooking show is inspiring. She has shown that with passion and hard work, dreams can come true.
Article Summary: iGumdrop is one of the contestants of the sixteenth season of MasterChef. She is well known for her food recipes which she streams on different social media channels. The dish that she prepared was wagyu beef satay in peanut sauce with coconut rice.

Article Title: 'I want all the evidence to...': Indian-origin Akash Singhania on calling police after Youtuber’s pedophilia accusation
Article Text:
Akash Singhania was falsely accused of being child predator











An Indian-origin man wrongly accused of being a pedophile in a viral online sting video has described the moment he decided to call the police, saying, “I want all the evidence to be documented immediately. Immediately.”Akash Singhania was publicly accused in California by YouTuber Vitaly Zdorovetskiy and his team of allegedly trying to meet a 16-year-old girl. The claims turned out to be false. The confrontation was filmed and shared online. It went viral and sparked backlash.Speaking about the moment tensions escalated, Singhania said he asked to see the Snapchat messages being used against him but was refused. That pushed him to involve law enforcement immediately.“I asked to look at the Snapchat and they wouldn't show me. And then right after that, I'm pretty sure, is when I was like, okay, I need to call the cops immediately because I want all the evidence to be documented. Like, I don't feel safe right now.”He added that his priority was to clear his name through official documentation. “And most importantly, all the evidence to exonerate me and clear my name fully because I'm fully innocent needs to be documented immediately.Immediately. And the only solution towards documenting that evidence properly, in my opinion, was the cops.”Singhania said that when officers arrived, he cooperated fully, even allowing them to search his phone. He also referred to his understanding of legal rights during police questioning.Akash explained the situation: “So I was like okay I'm gonna call the cops immediately then came and I was like take my phone look through everything go through everything I waived my like any normal person um if you've watched any type of lawyer tv show or anything they all say don't say anything don't say anything without the presence of counsel um like you should know your rights protect your rights um anything you can say will be used against you anything you say can and will be used against you. "He added: “Yeah. So, um, in the beginning I was, I was trying to get them to through all the evidence in the very beginning. Um, the moment that I met up with them, but they said, you need to wait until we read you rights.”“And so I had to wait before, you know, I could talk to them about anything. And then I like waved my rights and I told them, look through my phone, look through everything. I have nothing to hide."The incident began when Vitaly and his team confronted Singhania in a California neighbourhood, claiming he had arranged to meet a minor via Snapchat. During the exchange, Singhania repeatedly denied the allegation and insisted he believed he was speaking to an 18-year-old.Video from the scene also shows him asking the group to verify his messages. However, the accusations continued, with Vitaly at one point saying, “You are one of those tech Indians, smart ones huh,” alongside claims that multiple Snapchat accounts were involved.The situation escalated until police arrived. According to Singhania, officers from the Santa Ana Police Department reviewed the matter and confirmed he had done nothing wrong. He later thanked officers for handling of the case.Following the backlash, Vitaly publicly admitted the mistake and issued an apology. “We wrongly identified and accused Akash Singhania. We were completely wrong and made a terrible mistake,” he said.He also urged people to remove the viral clips, adding, “Our team and I messed up and we are deeply sorry to Akash. Whoever has those videos, delete it. The Snapchat messages got messed up, it was the wrong time, wrong place.”Despite the apology, Singhania said the damage had already been done, including harassment and harm to his reputation. “While I appreciate that the mistake has been acknowledged, the impact of the false accusation has been significant. I have experienced harassment, judgment, and damage to my personal and professional relationships based on something that has now been proven false.”
Article Summary: Akash Singhania was falsely accused of trying to meet a 16-year-old girl via Snapchat. The claims were made by YouTuber Vitaly Zdorovetskiy and his team. The confrontation was filmed and shared online. It went viral and sparked backlash.
